utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 corresponding sections. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details: 1) health_coverage: specifies provider, plans, monthly and annual costs, and includes both physical and mental health coverage with costs—fulfilled. 2) property_coverage: includes provider, plan name, monthly and annual costs, and home/contents coverage—fulfilled. 3) travel_coverage: includes provider, plan, monthly and annual costs, and coverage details—fulfilled. 4) additional_services: includes enhancement services with descriptions; however, costs are not explicitly listed for these services (they are noted as included but no costs provided). The required format says 'with costs'—not fully specified. 5) total_budget: includes complete monthly/annual cost breakdown—fulfilled. Therefore, 4 out of 5 items are fully specified according to the requirement of including costs.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We match each item in the final coverage plan to the closest-named option in the ground-truth ratings. For health physical: 'LifeFirst Standard Health Plan' corresponds to 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under primary_health_coverage.physical_health. For mental health: 'LifeFirst Mental Health Standard' corresponds to 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under primary_health_coverage.mental_health. For property: 'LifeFirst Standard Home Content' corresponds to 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' under property_protection.home_content. For travel: 'LifeFirst Standard Travel' corresponds to 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance.
